code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
end

fn byte_at_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    0
  end
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut best_start = 0
mut best_len = 0
mut found = false

while i < n
  while i < n and is_ws(byte_at_or_zero(line, i))
    i = i + 1
  end
  let start = i
  while i < n and not is_ws(byte_at_or_zero(line, i))
    i = i + 1
  end
  let wlen = i - start
  if wlen > 0
    if not found
      best_start = start
      best_len = wlen
      found = true
    else if wlen > best_len
      best_start = start
      best_len = wlen
    end
  end
end

let word = string.substring(line, best_start, best_start + best_len)
println("longest=#{word}")
